violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units throughout the kitchen and in the walk-in cooler were found dirty. Equipment in the small kitchen was also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine sanitizer was found at 0ppm. Chlorine sanitizers should be maintained at 50ppm.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Macaroni salad found in the walk-in cooler that was prepared more than 10 days ago. Potentially hazardous foods should be discarded if not consumed with-in 10 days.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine chlorine solution was found at 0ppm. Chlorine sanitizing solutions should be at least 50ppm for sanitizing food contact surfaces.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
